sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this strategy/action hybrid

special_mechanics.name: River Crossing
special_mechanics.description: Soldiers are slowed when crossing rivers and cannot fire while doing so

special_mechanics.name: Quicksand
special_mechanics.description: Environmental hazard that affects soldier movement

special_mechanics.name: Squad Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls up to 6 soldiers; can split squad into smaller units for positioning

tier_notes: Tier 3: Qualitative data only. Cannon Fodder is a strategy-action hybrid with overhead camera control. No precise physics parameters are documented. Game features squad-based tactics with point-and-click movement control rather than direct character physics mechanics. Environmental effects (rivers, quicksand) impact movement but without quantified values.
